name: Digitamamon

signature_move.name: Enigma
signature_move.description: Destroys the enemy's spirit with rainbow bubbles or a giant heart.

description: The ultimate Digimon which has the appearance of a " Digitama ", the beginning and end of all Digimon. It is said that Digitamamon, who is at the apex of evolution, will not evolve from normal Digimon, and will never evolve unless it fuses with data from another dimension. It is covered in an egg-shaped exoskeleton that renders all attacks meaningless. Its Special Moves are destroying the enemy's spirit ( Enigma ) and an orb of darkness ( Nightmare Syndrome ). All Digimon who suffer these attacks have their vital functions brought to a halt.
